blocks.name: axis-handoff
blocks.desc: X-axis pair. Outgoing object is thrown off the axis and cut mid-flight; incoming object decelerates onto the same axis. Objects shown are placeholders — drop in any text or UI block.

blocks.name: depth-handoff
blocks.desc: Z-axis pair. Outgoing object swells ~6% and is cut mid-swell; incoming object pops from 0.76 scale and decelerates into place. Objects shown are placeholders.

blocks.name: push-off-left
blocks.desc: Short throw, cut at peak. Accelerates the object just ~20px (1.5% of frame width) over 150ms and hard-cuts it while still fully on screen — measured −1 → −5 → −10 px/frame. Never animate it off-screen.

blocks.name: scale-up-cut
blocks.desc: Same law on Z. The object swells just ~6% over 100ms, accelerating (+5 → +16 → +24 px/frame), and is cut at peak while still fully visible.

blocks.name: glide-in
blocks.desc: Decelerates the object 80px onto the axis the outgoing one just left — long-tailed ease-out (~0.9s). Measured left edge 325 → 205, velocity −29 → −12 → −4 → −1 → 0. Pair with any text-animation block for per-word motion.

blocks.name: scale-pop-in
blocks.desc: Pops the object from 0.76 → 1.0 with a strong ease-out (~430ms, 62% of the change in the first 83ms), monotonic — no overshoot and no fade; scale alone carries the entrance.

blocks.name: soft-blur-in
blocks.desc: Per-character fade-in with a gentle blur and upward motion. Apple's signature hero-title reveal.

blocks.name: per-character-rise
blocks.desc: Letters slide up from below with no blur — crisp, deliberate, kinetic. Apple's clean tvOS-style reveal.

blocks.name: per-word-crossfade
blocks.desc: Words gently fade into place one after another, with a short vertical drift for a calm keynote rhythm.

blocks.name: spring-scale-in
blocks.desc: Words pop in with a soft overshoot scale, like a physical spring settling into place.

blocks.name: mask-reveal-up
blocks.desc: Lines reveal upward with a soft masked feel and compact stagger.

blocks.name: line-by-line-slide
blocks.desc: Each line enters from the left with a staggered slide and exits to the right for a flowing paragraph reveal.

blocks.name: typewriter
blocks.desc: Per-character stepped reveal with a minimal editorial typing rhythm.

blocks.name: micro-scale-fade
blocks.desc: A calm, tiny scale pop used as subtle premium polish for labels and headings.

blocks.name: shimmer-sweep
blocks.desc: A subtle sweep across a clean headline, blending in while gliding from left to center.

blocks.name: fade-through
blocks.desc: A Material-style content transition: old fades out, new fades in with a soft delay.

blocks.name: shared-axis-y
blocks.desc: Per-word hard-cut transition with staircase timing for sharp editorial swaps.

blocks.name: shared-axis-z
blocks.desc: Scale-based shared-axis transition for focus shifts and context depth.

blocks.name: blur-out-up
blocks.desc: Words arrive clean and depart upward with increasing blur for airy exits.

blocks.name: scale-down-fade
blocks.desc: Subtle premium settle-in with a restrained scale-down fade on exit.

blocks.name: focus-blur-resolve
blocks.desc: A premium focus pull from heavy blur to crisp text, then a soft blur-out exit.

blocks.name: bottom-up-letters
blocks.desc: Letters rise from below in a pronounced staircase, one symbol at a time, with zero blur.

blocks.name: top-down-letters
blocks.desc: Letters descend from above in a pronounced staircase, one symbol at a time, with zero blur.

blocks.name: chip-tokenize
blocks.desc: A typed @-mention converts in place into a colored tool chip ~0.1s after the word completes; typing continues around it.

blocks.name: log-theater
blocks.desc: Agent work as an accumulating checklist with app icons; the “Using X” header swaps as tools change; “Thinking” shimmers.

blocks.name: log-theater-zoomed
blocks.desc: The same log framed as a static macro crop — the window is bigger than the viewport, pinned to the top-left; the feed auto-scrolls inside.

blocks.name: camera macro-push
blocks.desc: The viewport pushes in ~1.6× over ~0.5s to showcase a hero component — strong ease-out that decelerates into the hold, no overshoot.
